mapper.sql: id, job_name, job_group, job_class_name, cron_expression, description, status, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_job SET job_name = #{jobName}, job_group = #{jobGroup}, job_class_name = #{jobClassName}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_job WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT FROM sys_job WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND job_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_job SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
